  "findings": [
    "Trip hazards from cords routed across active walkways",
    "Fall hazards due to missing guardrails on elevated work areas",
    "Blocked emergency egress routes and obstructed fire extinguishers",
    "Use of unsafe, improvised scaffolds",
    "Unattended and unguarded open floor holes"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Stop work immediately to address life-safety hazards",
    "Reroute or protect cords crossing walkways using cord covers or overhead suspension",
    "Install compliant guardrails or restrict access to elevated areas",
    "Clear all blocked egress paths and ensure fire extinguishers are fully accessible",
    "Dismantle improvised scaffolds and replace with compliant access equipment",
    "Cover and clearly label or barricade all open floor holes"
  ],
  "rationale": "The jobsite exhibits multiple severe, life-safety hazards including fall risks, trip hazards, blocked emergency equipment, and non-compliant access structures. These conditions violate basic OSHA standards and pose an immediate danger to workers, requiring an immediate stop-work order and corrective action.",
  "references": [
    "OSHA General Duty Clause Section 5(a)(1)",
    "29 CFR 1926 Subpart L (Scaffolds)",
    "29 CFR 1926.25 (Housekeeping)",
    "29 CFR 1926.501 (Duty to have fall protection)"
  ]
}
